untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern detection (Head-and-Shoulders Top formation and trend-line identification). These are visual/structural patterns that cannot be expressed using only price-based indicators and mathematical operators. HTF pattern recognition requires candlestick shape analysis, formation geometry, and support/resistance line fitting—capabilities not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using pivot as a reference point for breakout above formation, but this does not capture the actual HTF pattern logic. The 30-day hold reflects 'about a month' mentioned in source text. Exit condition uses reversal below 20-SMA as reasonable stop logic since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified. True implementation requires a custom pattern detector.
